identifyOwnRuntime.notes: The claimant string is the durable runtime identity. Role sessions must not infer runtime from repo persona names.

dispatchExecutor.workspaceIsolation: dedicated worktree from origin/main for write-capable executors
dispatchExecutor.handoff: brief file or stdin; executor reports only to the spawning role
dispatchExecutor.notes: Do not use inherited-context subagents for executor work. The brief must carry the shared executor rails.

monitorJob.wakeSemantics: durable notification: watcher records event in log/state; Codex role reconciles manifest and reads deltas at resume/status/checkpoint boundaries
monitorJob.notes: Codex has no in-harness Monitor primitive in this binding. Never patch tracked _quartet/clacks tooling to create a live watcher instance.

spawnFreshContextSession.longRunningRoleLaunch: operator-pasted kickoff into a new Codex session, using the same role protocol and this binding
spawnFreshContextSession.notes: Fresh means no inherited transcript. For long-running roles, the operator starts the session; for bounded checks, codex exec is acceptable.
